title: Swiss glaciers shrink as climate crisis fuels extreme heat across Europe
description: Switzerland's glaciers are facing unprecedented melting, with "glacier loss day" arriving exceptionally early this year due to a prolonged European heatwave, warm May, and insufficient winter snowfall. Experts warn that this rapid ice loss, exacerbated by persistent high temperatures, mirrors the dire conditions of 2022 and threatens to leave only remnants of glaciers by 2100, impacting vital European river systems.

title: 'Profound change required': Volkswagen plans 100,000 job cuts and four plant closures
description: Volkswagen is planning a massive job cut of 100,000 positions and the closure of four German plants. This drastic overhaul, the most significant in its history, aims to counter intense competition from Chinese electric vehicle makers. The automaker also intends to reduce research and development spending by 15% as it faces declining market share in China and growing pressure from rivals expanding globally.

The US hailed the accord as a crucial first step towards broader peace, though Hezbollah has rejected the negotiations.

description: Filmmaker SS Rajamouli has revealed significant progress on his ambitious Rs 1,400 crore film, 'Varanasi'. He confirmed that all major IMAX action sequences are now complete, with smaller connecting scenes being filmed. The director stated shooting should wrap by September or October. The time-travel epic, starring Mahesh Babu and Priyanka Chopra, is set for an April 2027 release and was filmed in IMAX to capture its grand scale.

description: A Pune realtor's murder investigation reveals a complex motive involving a secret relationship clashing with a family-arranged marriage. Police allege Siya Goyal, engaged to Ketan Agarwal, was close to co-accused Chetan Chaudhary. Investigators believe a forced marriage and a hidden affair led to the crime, with deleted chats and a staged push at Lohagad Fort central to the plot. Siya's brother has been questioned extensively.

title: US approves limited rollout of Anthropic's Mythos 5 AI model

This follows earlier concerns over national security vulnerabilities. The government, citing improved safeguards, has allowed a limited rollout, with ongoing discussions to broaden access and potentially restore public availability of its less powerful Fable 5 model. This development underscores the evolving regulatory landscape for cutting-edge AI.

He transitioned to a religious non-profit, then launched Kafi BBQ in Texas.  Despite immense personal investment and long hours, he finds profound satisfaction in serving his community and perfecting his craft, proving that passion can be more rewarding than profit.
